Shahed

Junior Programmer & Fashionista

YouTube: @genzthepixel
LinkedIn: genzthepixel
X: @genzthepixel
becat.tech

Profile

A passionate junior programmer driven by precision and creativity. Started coding in Class 9 with C, developing a deep obsession with physics simulation — building systems that model real-world phenomena with 100% mathematical accuracy. Creator of BecatTech, a privacy-first API search engine. Programming is not just a skill — it's art.

Projects

Wind Physics in Gaming

C Physics

A custom wind simulation engine in pure C. Models turbulent airflow, drag coefficients, and density variations to produce 100% accurate game physics. Implements Navier-Stokes approximations for real-time performance.

Large-Scale Numerical Computation

Python Java Math

Solving massive numerical problems — N-body gravitational simulations, Poisson equation solvers, and field calculations — using optimized algorithms in Python and Java. Built for precision at scale with 64-bit floating point.

BecatTech — API Search Engine

HTML CSS JS API

Founded and built BecatTech (becat.tech) — an API-powered search engine designed as a DuckDuckGo alternative. Delivers fast, private search results through a clean, modern interface. Served 90% of the local community.

Education

Higher Secondary Certificate (HSC)

Class 11 · Currently Enrolled · Science

Continuing studies with a focus on Physics, Mathematics, and Computer Science fundamentals.

Secondary School Certificate (SSC)

Science · GPA 4.33 · 2023

Graduated with a strong foundation in Physics and Mathematics, sparking a deep interest in computational simulation.
